module relaxed_laneselect.0.wasm
assert_return i8x16.relaxed_laneselect v128:000112120405060708090a0b0c0d0e0f v128:101134341415161718191a1b1c1d1e1f v128:ff00f00f000000000000000000000000 -> either:v128:001114321415161718191a1b1c1d1e1f|v128:001112341415161718191a1b1c1d1e1f
assert_return i16x8.relaxed_laneselect v128:00000100341234120400050006000700 v128:08000900785678560c000d000e000f00 v128:ffff000000ffff000000000000000000 -> either:v128:00000900781234560c000d000e000f00|v128:00000900341278560c000d000e000f00
assert_return i16x8.relaxed_laneselect v128:00000100341234120400050006000700 v128:08000900785678560c000d000e000f00 v128:ffff000000ff80000000000000000000 -> either:v128:00000900781278560c000d000e000f00|v128:00000900341278560c000d000e000f00|v128:00000900781234560c000d000e000f00
assert_return i32x4.relaxed_laneselect v128:00000000010000003412341234123412 v128:04000000050000007856785678567856 v128:ffffffff000000000000ffffffff0000 -> either:v128:00000000050000007856341234127856|v128:00000000050000003412341278567856
assert_return i64x2.relaxed_laneselect v128:00000000000000000100000000000000 v128:02000000000000000300000000000000 v128:ffffffffffffffff0000000000000000 -> either:v128:00000000000000000300000000000000|v128:00000000000000000300000000000000
assert_return i64x2.relaxed_laneselect v128:34123412341234123412341234123412 v128:78567856785678567856785678567856 v128:00000000ffffffffffffffff00000000 -> either:v128:78567856341234123412341278567856|v128:34123412341234127856785678567856
assert_return i8x16.relaxed_laneselect_cmp v128:000112120405060708090a0b0c0d0e0f v128:101134341415161718191a1b1c1d1e1f v128:ff00f00f000000000000000000000000 -> v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff
assert_return i16x8.relaxed_laneselect_cmp v128:00000100341234120400050006000700 v128:08000900785678560c000d000e000f00 v128:ffff000000ffff000000000000000000 -> v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff
assert_return i32x4.relaxed_laneselect_cmp v128:00000000010000003412341234123412 v128:04000000050000007856785678567856 v128:ffffffff000000000000ffffffff0000 -> v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff
assert_return i64x2.relaxed_laneselect_cmp v128:00000000000000000100000000000000 v128:02000000000000000300000000000000 v128:ffffffffffffffff0000000000000000 -> v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff
assert_return i64x2.relaxed_laneselect_cmp v128:34123412341234123412341234123412 v128:78567856785678567856785678567856 v128:00000000ffffffffffffffff00000000 -> v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff
